settings.title: Book a Free Spring Security Checkup
settings.excerpt: Through April we are running no-cost reviews to find the gaps before someone else does.
settings.body:
Security is not a thing you set up once and forget. New staff, new software, and old passwords all open small gaps over time, and they tend to go unnoticed until they matter.

For the month of April, Uplink is offering a free security checkup to local businesses. We review your backups, your access controls, and your most obvious risks, then hand you a plain-language summary of what to fix first.

There is no obligation attached. We would simply rather help you find the weak spots now than be called in after they have been found for you.
